arts.sum: The contrast between the two halves in last Thursday’s defeat to West Ham offered a “big lesson” to the Leicester City players, Ruud van Nisterlooy suggested. Ruud van Nistelrooy knows where Leicester City problem lies over Jamie Vardy goal struggles
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy retains total faith in striker Jamie Vardy with the Leicester City captain to continue leading the line. “We have to make sure we keep creating chances for our attacking players,” van Nistelrooy said.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stance on Raheem Sterling has emerged after disastrous season for Gunners
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal from Chelsea on loan in the summer last year. The former Manchester City man, who has the experience of winning the Premier League with Pep Guardiola’s team, was expected to offer experience, depth and quality to Mikel Arteta’s side.
